testcase.name: Guardrail Enforcement E2E › G1: EP.POS.Ready gate checks QR-only changes
Guardrail Enforcement E2E › G3: EP.REM.Coverage gate validates REM format
Guardrail Enforcement E2E › G5: EP.Drift.Alert gate monitors Reflex uplift
POS to UI E2E Flow › Complete flow: POS order → SDK event → Ledger credit → UI display
POS to UI E2E Flow › EP.POS.Ready gate blocks QR-only changes
POS to UI E2E Flow › EP.REM.Coverage gate validates event format
